title: Black Clover: Sword of the Wizard King (Movie)
synopsis: In a kingdom where magic is everything, Asta, a boy born without any magical power, aims to become the "Wizard King" to overcome adversity and fulfill his promise to his friends. Just as the kingdom prepares for the historic Triumph tournament, Conrad Leto, the previous Wizard King who was once sealed away due to his rebellion, suddenly breaks free using the legendary Imperial Sword. Seeking to destroy the entire Clover Kingdom and resurrect a society built on his own extreme ideals, he brings back three of the most feared and powerful ancient Wizard Kings from history. Facing their biggest crisis yet, Asta, Yuno, and the Magic Knights must unite in an explosive, all-out war to protect their home and prove what true strength means.
subtitle: English
